script:
set +e
echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/patch-alej-chunking.py
sudo python3 /tmp/patch-alej-chunking.py
RC=$?
if [ "$RC" -ne 0 ]; then echo "patch failed rc=$RC"; exit $RC; fi
sudo chown alejandro:alejandro /home/alejandro/alejandro-responder.py
sudo systemctl restart alejandro-responder.service
sleep 4
echo "alejandro-responder: $(systemctl is-active alejandro-responder.service)"
